title: Rename device - Rename, spec chars
scenario: Device name with special characters (e.g., ?*\!#$%&'()+,-./:;@[]^_`{|}~) does not persist or reflect on Home screen after renaming in Device Settings > General
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with the Bluetooth audio device connected.
3. Tap the device's official name field.
4. Enter special characters for the name (e.g., ?*\!#$%&'()+,-./:;@[]^_`{|}~).
5. Tap Done to save the new name.
expected: The device name is successfully changed to the entered special characters and the updated name is reflected on the Home screen.
